name: Jim's Sweet-Sour Yams
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cut yams (sweet potatoes), in light syrup (16 oz each)
1 can Chunk Pineapple in natural juice (20 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the pineapple chunks and sweet potatoes into a 2-quart microwavable pan.
2. Peel the kiwi fruit, cut into quarters length-wise, and slice thinly.
3. Cut the pineapple chunks into quarters.
4. Add brown sugar and corn starch to the liquid in the pan; mix well.
5. Add butter and raisins. Microwave at 60% power for 3 minutes, or until the butter is melted; mix well.
6. Add pineapple and kiwi fruit. Microwave at 80% power for 5 minutes. Mix well.
7. Continue microwaving at 80% power for an additional 5 minutes, or until the sauce begins to thicken.
8. Add sweet potatoes. Mix gently so as not to break up the potatoes; microwave at 80% power for another 5 minutes.
9. Let stand for 3 minutes before stirring and serving.
